raw: The pass admits up to three adults and 3 children for the discounted rates of $20 per adult, $17 per senior, and $15 per youth. The hall is open daily from 10 am to 4 pm. But be sure to check their list of early closings before you reserve this pass.

source_phrases.max_adults: up to three adults and 3 children
source_phrases.max_children: up to three adults and 3 children
source_phrases.max_people: up to three adults and 3 children
